story.title: One Punch Man: Z-City Patrol Test
story.premise: A compact local prototype world for testing anime-style characters inside the AI World Simulator loop. Z-City has a plaza, training lot, association kiosk, noodle shop, ruined overpass, and monster alley. A flashy rival keeps trying to turn errands into a duel while the heroes handle ordinary problems.
story.opening: The player arrives in Z-City during a quiet morning that will not stay quiet. Heroes are scattered across the block, the Hero Association wants proof before raising an alert, and a ninja challenger is watching for a chance to make trouble.
story.currentObjective: Help the heroes stabilize Z-City before the next monster alert.
mysteries: Who keeps leaving challenge marks near the ruined overpass?
Why did a monster scale end up by the association kiosk?
Can ordinary errands stay ordinary in Z-City?
beats: Saitama needs his grocery coupon before the market closes.
Genos wants a spare core component from Monster Alley.
Mumen Rider needs proof before reporting the overpass threat.
Tatsumaki is annoyed that the threat is still only a rumor.
Speed-o'-Sound Sonic is waiting for a dramatic challenge.

rules.text: Hero Association reports matter more when backed by witnesses or physical proof.
Ignored monster signs increase public panic and director pressure.
A direct punch from the caped bald hero resolves most combat instantly, so drama must come from timing, errands, witnesses, and consequences.

tensions.title: A monster sign was found near the overpass

villainPlans.title: Stage a dramatic overpass challenge
villainPlans.objective: Leave signs, collect monster scraps, and force the caped bald hero into a public duel before the alert clears.
villainPlans.nextTrigger: If proof is ignored until dusk, the challenger appears at the ruined overpass.
knownFacts: monster scraps make the alert look worse

pendingReveals: A challenge mark points from the overpass toward the plaza.

visual.description: Concrete plaza with crosswalk paint, low railings, and passing civilians.
Exercise mats and torn concrete where morning training left evidence.
Stacked apartment balconies over a quiet side street.
Small official kiosk with alert signage and radio chatter.
Broken overpass span with challenge marks and exposed concrete.
Back alley with dented crates, monster scraps, and service pipes.

items.name: Grocery coupon
items.description: A limited supermarket discount coupon. Saitama cares about this more than the threat level.

items.name: Association radio
items.description: A small radio tuned to Hero Association alert chatter.

items.name: Challenge note
items.description: A dramatic note promising a duel near the overpass.

items.name: Spare cyborg core
items.description: A compact repair component Genos can use after patrol damage.

items.name: Monster scale
items.description: A jagged scale from an unknown monster. It proves the overpass alert is real.

interactables.name: Training timer
interactables.description: A battered stopwatch left near the exercise mats.
interactables.inspectText: The timer stopped beside a torn coupon edge after Saitama's morning exercise.

interactables.name: Hero Association report board
interactables.description: A pinned board of partial monster-alert reports.
interactables.inspectText: The latest overpass report is missing physical proof, so Mumen Rider cannot file the alert yet.

interactables.name: Sonic challenge marks
interactables.description: Sharp cuts in the overpass rail, arranged like a theatrical signature.
interactables.inspectText: The marks point from the Ruined Overpass back toward the plaza. Sonic wants the alert to become a public duel.

npcs.name: Saitama
npcs.description: An overwhelmingly strong hero who treats world-ending threats and grocery discounts with the same flat calm.

appearance.bodyType: plain average build with relaxed posture
appearance.outfit: yellow bodysuit, white cape, red gloves
appearance.silhouette: Simple bald head, round cape shape, and bright yellow suit.

goals: finish errands before the market closes
help if someone is actually in danger

ambitions.title: Recover the grocery coupon before the sale ends
Avoid turning every patrol into a duel

memories.text: A grocery coupon fell out near the training lot after morning exercise.
Sonic keeps trying to make everything into a dramatic challenge.

npcs.name: Genos
npcs.description: A serious cyborg hero collecting evidence and repair parts while overanalyzing Saitama's routines.

appearance.bodyType: lean athletic build with mechanical arms
appearance.outfit: black tactical clothes with gold cyborg arms
appearance.silhouette: Spiky hair, glowing eyes, and heavy mechanical forearms.

ambitions.title: Recover the spare cyborg core from Monster Alley
Document every monster sign for the Hero Association

memories.text: A spare cyborg core was lost after a skirmish in Monster Alley.
Saitama said the grocery coupon is important, so the coupon is important.

npcs.name: Mumen Rider
npcs.description: A brave cyclist hero who needs real proof before sending civilians into panic.

appearance.outfit: green cyclist armor, cream chest plate, utility belt
appearance.silhouette: Helmet, cyclist armor, and square heroic stance.

goals: collect proof of the overpass threat

ambitions.title: Collect proof before filing the overpass alert
Keep civilians away from Monster Alley

memories.text: A jagged monster scale was seen near the ruined overpass.
The Association radio keeps catching static from Monster Alley.

npcs.name: Tatsumaki
npcs.description: A powerful psychic hero annoyed that weaker heroes are taking too long to resolve a small threat.

appearance.outfit: black dress-like hero outfit with green psychic glow
appearance.silhouette: Small floating psychic silhouette with curled green hair.

goals: prove the alert is below S-class concern
keep weaker heroes from getting hurt

ambitions.title: Resolve the Z-City alert before it becomes embarrassing

memories.text: The overpass threat is probably small, but small threats still hurt civilians.
Sonic's challenge marks are theatrical and annoying.

npcs.name: Speed-o'-Sound Sonic
npcs.description: A flashy ninja rival trying to manufacture a dramatic duel while the heroes handle practical patrol work.

appearance.outfit: dark ninja outfit with purple scarf and weapon straps
appearance.silhouette: Sharp ninja silhouette with long hair, scarf, and blade straps.

goals: force Saitama into a public duel
leave challenge marks near the overpass
avoid being dismissed as a nuisance

ambitions.title: Force the caped bald hero into a public duel
Keep leaving challenge marks near the overpass

secrets.text: Sonic planted challenge marks near the overpass to lure Saitama into a duel.

memories.text: The challenge note near the overpass is bait for Saitama.
A monster scale makes the alert look more serious than the duel bait alone.

quests.title: Recover Saitama's grocery coupon
quests.description: Saitama lost a grocery coupon near the Training Lot. Recover it before the sale ends.

quests.title: Recover Genos's spare cyborg core
quests.description: Genos needs a spare core component from Monster Alley before another patrol damages him further.

quests.title: Verify the overpass monster sign
quests.description: Mumen Rider needs proof before filing an overpass alert. Find the challenge note or monster scale near the Ruined Overpass.
